scripts.dev: npm run docker:up && npm run dev:apps
scripts.dev:apps: npm run dev:packages:build && concurrently -n pkg,api,ui,worker -c gray,blue,green,yellow "npm run dev:packages" "npm run dev --workspace=@growthpath/api" "npm run dev --workspace=@growthpath/ui" "npm run dev --workspace=@growthpath/worker"
scripts.dev:packages:build: npm run build --workspace=@growthpath/config && npm run build --workspace=@growthpath/shared && npm run build --workspace=@growthpath/data && npm run build --workspace=@growthpath/scoring-engine && npm run build --workspace=@growthpath/scan-engine
scripts.dev:packages: concurrently -n config,shared,data,score,scan "npm run dev --workspace=@growthpath/config" "npm run dev --workspace=@growthpath/shared" "npm run dev --workspace=@growthpath/data" "npm run dev --workspace=@growthpath/scoring-engine" "npm run dev --workspace=@growthpath/scan-engine"
